title: Deceased or interdicted succession representative
doc_html:
Art. 3338.  Deceased or interdicted succession representative

If a succession representative dies or is interdicted, an account of his administration may be filed by his heirs or by his legal representative; and upon the petition of an interested person the court shall order the filing of such an account.
doc_text:
Art. 3338.  Deceased or interdicted succession representative
If a succession representative dies or is interdicted, an account of his administration may be filed by his heirs or by his legal representative; and upon the petition of an interested person the court shall order the filing of such an account.
